params.name: 5th Element
params.source: Fragment Crafting (5.2%), Grandmaster Scrolls (2.1%), Lottery Machine (0.24%), Master Scrolls (1.9%), TECH Master Scrolls (9.2%), Wishing (0.19%)
params.description:
On May 11, 2015 AD, scientists found the fifth fundamental force of nature.

The universe's matter is pulled together and pushed apart by forces. There are currently 4 fundamental forces, including gravity and electromagnetic force. The 5th Element is a kind of matter that theoretically accounts for 80% of the total mass in the universe. The energy of this element is calculated to equal seventeen trillion electronvolts. It also interacts with hot elements, cold elements, dry elements, wet elemen …
